findings.description: Windows Firewall is enabled on all network profiles (Domain, Private, Public).
findings.recommendation: No action required. Periodically review firewall rules.

findings.description: SMBv1 is disabled. The host is protected against EternalBlue-class attacks.
LLMNR and NetBIOS are disabled. Name-poisoning attack surface is minimised.
Windows Defender is active and signatures are current.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Ensure signatures update automatically.

findings.description: No deprecated TLS/SSL protocols detected. Only TLS 1.2+ is active.
Password policy meets baseline requirements (length, age, lockout).
findings.raw_output:
Force user logoff how long after time expires?:       Never
Minimum password age (days):                         1
Maximum password age (days):                         90
Minimum password length:                             14
Length of password history maintained:               24
Lockout threshold:                                   5

findings.recommendation: No action required. Ensure automatic updates are configured.

findings.description: Administrator group has 2 member(s): CORP\Domain Admins, CORP\svc-admin.
findings.recommendation: Periodically review and audit administrator group membership.

findings.description: Privileged group memberships appear within expected limits.
findings.raw_output:
Backup Operators: _EMPTY_
Remote Desktop Users: CORP\RDP-Users
Remote Management Users: _EMPTY_
Power Users: _EMPTY_

findings.description: Event logs are configured with adequate sizes.
findings.recommendation: Consider forwarding logs to a SIEM for centralised retention.

findings.description: LSASS is protected (RunAsPPL or Credential Guard enabled).
No weak cipher suites (RC4, DES, 3DES, NULL, EXPORT) are enabled.
No SMB shares with overly permissive Everyone/Authenticated Users access.
findings.recommendation: Periodically audit share permissions with Get-SmbShareAccess.

findings.description: No obvious EOL software detected from the installed packages list.
findings.recommendation: Maintain an up-to-date software inventory and regularly review EOL dates.
